title: Cape Verde's Possible Lineup Against Spain at the 2026 FIFA World Cup
original_text:
The Cape Verde national team is preparing for one of the most important matches in its history as it takes on Spain in the opening game of Group H at the 2026 FIFA World Cup .

The Blue Sharks will be making their first-ever appearance at a FIFA World Cup, becoming one of four debutants in the tournament alongside Curaçao , Jordan , and Uzbekistan .

Standing in their way is one of world football's traditional powers. Spain, world champions in 2010 and led by stars such as Lamine Yamal , Rodri , and Pedri , arrive as one of the favorites to challenge for the title.

Qualifying for the World Cup was already one of the greatest achievements in the country's football history.

Under head coach Bubista , Cape Verde secured its place in the tournament through an outstanding qualifying campaign, particularly at home, where the team won every match without conceding a single goal and finished ahead of traditional African powerhouse Cameroon .

Now comes the ultimate challenge. With Uruguay and Saudi Arabia also part of Group H, every point could prove crucial in the battle to reach the knockout stage.

Bubista is expected to rely heavily on the players who helped deliver the country's historic qualification.

The match between Spain and Cape Verde will be played on June 15 , marking the World Cup debut of the African nation and the opening game for both teams in Group H.

Match: Spain vs Cape Verde
Competition: FIFA World Cup 2026 – Group H
Date: June 15, 2026

Follow all the action from the 2026 FIFA World Cup on beIN SPORTS.
